beats.title: Tea at the Towers
beats.boundaryReason: Opening reunion scene at Ryu's tower before the rumor hook arrives.
dateEvidence: The session opens in early November with late-morning tea at Ryu's tower.
The campaign timeline places Ander's visit to Ryu on 1747-11-08.

beats.title: Rumor on the Docks
beats.boundaryReason: The party forms, sails north, and reaches Eskorola to hear the village account.
dateEvidence: The group decides to investigate the same day after hearing Jaeson's rumor.
The campaign timeline places their arrival at Eskorola in the late afternoon of 1747-11-08.

beats.title: Tracks in the Marsh
beats.boundaryReason: Amaya leads the scouting trip, the party inspects the attack site, then rests overnight before dawn.
dateEvidence: The attack-site visit happens after the late-afternoon arrival at Eskorola.
The beat explicitly ends with an overnight rest and the line “as morning dawns.”

beats.title: Into the Mists
beats.boundaryReason: A fresh dawn departure leads to scouting, note inspection, and the stealthy canoe approach before contact.
dateEvidence: The beat begins immediately after “as morning dawns.”
The session timeline places the marsh expedition on 1747-11-09 morning.

beats.title: Steam in the Fog
beats.boundaryReason: The ambush by steam creatures starts as Nerissa's spell reveals the first attackers in the mist.
dateEvidence: This follows directly from the same dawn approach through the marsh.
No sleep, meal, or travel break suggests a date change.

beats.title: The Burning Guardian
beats.boundaryReason: A larger fire cultist joins the battle at the tunnel and the fight ends with a shrapnel explosion.
dateEvidence: The guardian enters immediately during the ongoing marsh fight.
The scene remains continuous and on the same morning.

beats.title: Over the Nest
beats.boundaryReason: After a short recovery, the party regroups, climbs the mound, and discovers the dragon turtle below.
dateEvidence: The party takes only a brief pause to heal and reassess after the explosion.
No later day marker appears before they climb the nest.

beats.title: Arrow in the Neck
beats.boundaryReason: The second battle opens with the party trying to reach the dragon turtle and loosen the black spear.
dateEvidence: Initiative is rolled immediately after the party spots the mage and turtle below.
The encounter is continuous with the same morning assault on the nest.

beats.title: Breaking the Charm
beats.boundaryReason: Once the spear comes free, the fight shifts to freeing Chaessenth and dropping the mage's control.
dateEvidence: The campaign timeline places the dragon turtle rescue and mage fight on 1747-11-09.
The session manifest ends in the afternoon, matching the long fight and immediate aftermath.

beats.title: Songs of the Deep
beats.boundaryReason: The battle gives way to conversation with Chaessenth, new lore, and the return toward Eskorola and Hamri.
dateEvidence: This begins immediately after the mage falls and Chaessenth is healed.
The campaign timeline places the revelations and departure west later the same day.
